draft:
Subject: Re: Application: Senior AI Engineer - Sarah Jenkins

Dear Anjaninithin,

Thank you for expressing your interest in the Senior AI Engineer position at Hermes AI and for sharing your impressive background and experience in building and deploying scalable Large Language Model agents and orchestration systems. Your accomplishments at TechCorp, particularly in optimizing agent token latency, are commendable.

I have reviewed your resume, and it aligns well with the qualifications we are looking for. We are excited about the potential of your contributions to our advanced intelligence pipeline products.

Our recruiting team will be reviewing all applications, and you can expect to hear from us regarding the next steps soon. If you have any further information to share in the meantime, please feel free to do so.

Thank you once again for your application, and we look forward to the possibility of working together at Hermes AI.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
Hermes AI Recruitment Team
original_subject: Application: Senior AI Engineer - Sarah Jenkins
original_body:
Hello Recruiting Team,
I am writing to express my strong interest in the Senior AI Engineer position at Hermes AI, as advertised on LinkedIn.
With over 6 years of experience building and deploying scalable Large Language Model (LLM) agents, orchestration systems, and custom RAG pipelines, I am confident in my ability to contribute to your advanced intelligence pipeline products.
\n\n
I have attached my resume detailing my accomplishments at TechCorp, where I led the developer platform team and optimized agent token latency by 45%.
\n\n
Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you regarding potential next steps.
\n\n
Sincerely,
\n
Sarah Jenkins
\n
Phone: (555) 019-2834
\n
Website: sarahcodes.dev"
,

full_msg.subject: Application: Senior AI Engineer - Sarah Jenkins

body.content:
Hello Recruiting Team,

I am writing to express my strong interest in the Senior AI Engineer position at Hermes AI, as advertised on LinkedIn.

With over 6 years of experience building and deploying scalable Large Language Model (LLM) agents, orchestration systems, and custom RAG pipelines, I am confident in my ability to contribute to your advanced intelligence pipeline products. I have attached my resume detailing my accomplishments at TechCorp, where I led the developer platform team and optimized agent token latency by 45%. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you regarding potential next steps. Sincerely, Sarah Jenkins Phone: (555) 019-2834 Website: sarahcodes.dev",
